title: Fit test - Onboarding flow - Fit Test is present
scenario: Fit Test screen appears in Onboarding flow under Device Settings with Skip/Test options matching Figma design
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Complete the initial onboarding flow up to the Pairing 2 screen.
3. After the Pairing 2 screen, observe the Fit Test screen.
4. On the Fit Test screen, verify the bottom of the screen displays two options: Skip and Test.
5. Compare the layout and appearance of the Fit Test screen (including the Skip/Test buttons) against the Figma design reference.
expected: The Fit Test screen appears after the Pairing 2 screen in the onboarding flow under Device Settings. The screen displays Skip and Test options at the bottom, matching the Figma design.
